calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Patton of Toschi, Sidran, Collins & Doyle APC telephone number 510-835-3400 appeared by telephone for Defendant David Gin.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF COMPANION PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Tax Costs is granted in part. $4407 of the total claimed costs of $10,237 is taxed. Defendant David Gin is entitled to costs as the prevailing party per CCP 1032(a)(4) and (b). Plaintiff challenged certain costs that do not appear valid on their face and have not been adequately substantiated or justified by defendant and thus those costs are taxed. Those costs are: 1) ex parte application of $495; 2) certain Mina deposition costs of $561; 3) certain Gin deposition costs of $51; 4) physician record review charges of $1800; 5) expert witness fees of $1500. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Set For Trial On May-02-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
